prompt: I just finished implementing the document upload feature with drag-and-drop in Upload.jsx. The backend endpoint is working but I haven't tested the frontend interaction at all. Can you set up Playwright and write e2e tests for the upload flow?
assertions: Reads the Upload.jsx component source before writing selectors
Creates or references a playwright.config.ts file
Writes a spec file targeting the upload flow (drag-and-drop or file input)
Tests at least one happy path and one error case (e.g. unsupported file type)
Uses role/text/label selectors or reads component to get accurate class names — does NOT invent selectors like data-testid without verifying they exist
